title: Aiko Hears Animal Friends
synopsis: Baby Aiko discovers the wonderful sounds that different animals make as she explores her neighborhood, from chirping birds to barking dogs, creating a delightful auditory adventure perfect for little ones learning about sounds and animals.

illustration.description: A smiling Japanese toddler girl with short black hair in a yellow dress stands in a sunny garden, hands cupped to her ears in a listening pose. Soft pastel colors fill the scene with blooming flowers and a bright blue sky. Her expression shows wonder and curiosity.

Two colorful birds perched on a flowering cherry blossom branch above Aiko, their beaks open mid-song. The birds are rendered in soft watercolor style with bright blue and red feathers. Aiko looks up with delight, pointing at the singing birds.
illustration.alt: Birds tweeting in a tree above Aiko

illustration.description: A friendly golden retriever with a wagging tail sits next to Aiko on soft green grass. The dog's mouth is open in a happy bark while Aiko giggles and reaches out to pet the fluffy fur. Warm golden and green tones create a cozy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: A golden dog barking happily with Aiko

illustration.description: An orange tabby kitten sits on a garden fence, mouth open in a tiny meow. Aiko stands below with arms outstretched, smiling up at the kitten. Soft orange and cream colors dominate the scene with delicate flower details in the background.
illustration.alt: Orange kitten meowing from a fence to Aiko

illustration.description: A large, friendly cartoon bee with yellow and black stripes hovers near purple flowers while Aiko watches from a safe distance. The bee has oversized, gentle eyes and translucent wings. Aiko's expression shows fascination rather than fear.
illustration.alt: A friendly bee buzzing around flowers near Aiko

illustration.description: A black and white spotted cow stands in a green pasture, head lowered toward Aiko who reaches up to touch the cow's nose. The cow has kind, large brown eyes and a gentle expression. Rolling hills and blue sky create a peaceful farm setting.
illustration.alt: Gentle cow mooing while Aiko reaches up to touch its nose

illustration.description: A bright green frog sits on a lily pad in a small pond, throat puffed out mid-croak. Aiko kneels at the pond's edge, hands on her knees, watching with wonder. Water lilies and cattails frame the scene in soft aqua and green tones.
illustration.alt: Green frog croaking on lily pad while Aiko watches from pond edge

illustration.description: Aiko sits in the center of the garden surrounded by all the animals from previous pages - birds, dog, cat, bee, cow, and frog. She claps her hands with joy while musical notes float around her. All the animals appear to be making their sounds simultaneously in a harmonious celebration.
illustration.alt: Aiko surrounded by all the animals making their happy sounds together

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the dog make?
questions.explanation: Dogs say 'Woof, woof!' when they bark.

questions.question: Which animal says 'Tweet, tweet!'?
questions.explanation: Birds sing 'Tweet, tweet!' in the trees.

questions.question: What does Aiko do when she hears the sounds?
questions.explanation: Aiko loves listening to all the animal sounds around her.
